title: LavaWalker
description:
LavaWalker generates obsidians as you walk over
lava. Generated Obsidians melt into lava through
crying obsidians over time.
body:
## Available for
(Neo)Forge 1.21.x ~ 1.18.x 1.12.2  
Fabric 1.21.x ~ 1.19.x
  
## Main Features
LavaWalker generates obsidians as you walk over lava.  
Generated Obsidians melt into lava through crying obsidians over time.

## How to obtain?  
Lava Walker is a treasure enchantment; it can be obtained via villager trading.  
In addition, if Villager Trade Rebalance is effective, Desert or Taiga Villager have Lava Walker in their common trades.
